name: setFlagGridlines
description: Master switch to enable or disable ALL grids, lines, and points. When disabled (false), none of the celestial reference elements are displayed regardless of individual settings.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to enable all grid elements, false to disable all

name: getFlagGridlines
description: Returns whether the master switch for grids and lines is enabled.

name: setFlagAllGrids
description: Master switch to enable or disable ALL coordinate grids (Azimuthal, Equatorial, Equatorial J2000, Ecliptic, Ecliptic J2000, Galactic, Supergalactic, Fixed Equatorial).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to enable all grids, false to disable all

name: setFlagAllLines
description: Master switch to enable or disable ALL great circle lines (Equator, Ecliptic, Meridian, Horizon, Colures, Precession Circles, etc.).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to enable all lines, false to disable all

name: setFlagAllPoints
description: Master switch to enable or disable ALL reference points (Celestial Poles, Zenith/Nadir, Galactic Center, Equinoxes, Solstices, etc.).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to enable all points, false to disable all

name: setFlagAzimuthalGrid
description: Shows or hides the Azimuthal Grid (Altitude/Azimuth coordinate system). This grid is fixed to the observer's horizon and is useful for telescope pointing.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show azimuthal grid, false to hide

name: getFlagAzimuthalGrid
description: Returns whether the Azimuthal Grid is currently visible.

name: setColorAzimuthalGrid
description: Sets the color of the Azimuthal Grid lines.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector with values between 0.0 and 1.0

name: getColorAzimuthalGrid
description: Returns the current color of the Azimuthal Grid.
example:
var color = GridLinesMgr.getColorAzimuthalGrid();
core.debug("Color: RGB(" + color[0] + ", " + color[1] + ", " + color[2] + ")");

name: setFlagEquatorGrid
description: Shows or hides the Equatorial Grid (Right Ascension/Declination coordinate system for the current date).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show equatorial grid, false to hide

name: getFlagEquatorGrid
description: Returns whether the Equatorial Grid is visible.

name: setColorEquatorGrid
description: Sets the color of the Equatorial Grid lines.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEquatorGrid
description: Returns the current color of the Equatorial Grid.

name: setFlagFixedEquatorGrid
description: Shows or hides the Fixed Equatorial Grid (Hour Angle/Declination coordinate system). This grid is fixed relative to the observer's location.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show fixed equatorial grid, false to hide

name: getFlagFixedEquatorGrid
description: Returns whether the Fixed Equatorial Grid is visible.

name: setColorFixedEquatorGrid
description: Sets the color of the Fixed Equatorial Grid lines.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorFixedEquatorGrid
description: Returns the current color of the Fixed Equatorial Grid.

name: setFlagEquatorJ2000Grid
description: Shows or hides the Equatorial Grid for the J2000.0 epoch. This grid is fixed to the celestial coordinate system of the year 2000.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show J2000 equatorial grid, false to hide

example:
// Show equatorial grid for J2000 epoch
GridLinesMgr.setFlagEquatorJ2000Grid(true);

name: getFlagEquatorJ2000Grid
description: Returns whether the Equatorial J2000 Grid is visible.

name: setColorEquatorJ2000Grid
description: Sets the color of the Equatorial J2000 Grid lines.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEquatorJ2000Grid
description: Returns the current color of the Equatorial J2000 Grid.

name: setFlagEclipticJ2000Grid
description: Shows or hides the Ecliptic Grid for the J2000.0 epoch. The ecliptic is the apparent path of the Sun across the sky.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show J2000 ecliptic grid, false to hide

name: getFlagEclipticJ2000Grid
description: Returns whether the Ecliptic J2000 Grid is visible.

name: setColorEclipticJ2000Grid
description: Sets the color of the Ecliptic J2000 Grid lines.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEclipticJ2000Grid
description: Returns the current color of the Ecliptic J2000 Grid.

name: setFlagEclipticGrid
description: Shows or hides the Ecliptic Grid for the current date. The ecliptic grid updates with precession and nutation.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show ecliptic grid for current date, false to hide

name: getFlagEclipticGrid
description: Returns whether the Ecliptic Grid is visible.

name: setColorEclipticGrid
description: Sets the color of the Ecliptic Grid lines.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEclipticGrid
description: Returns the current color of the Ecliptic Grid.

name: setFlagGalacticGrid
description: Shows or hides the Galactic Grid (Galactic coordinate system based on the Milky Way's plane).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show galactic grid, false to hide

name: getFlagGalacticGrid
description: Returns whether the Galactic Grid is visible.

name: setColorGalacticGrid
description: Sets the color of the Galactic Grid lines.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorGalacticGrid
description: Returns the current color of the Galactic Grid.

name: setFlagSupergalacticGrid
description: Shows or hides the Supergalactic Grid (coordinate system based on the local supercluster plane).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show supergalactic grid, false to hide

name: getFlagSupergalacticGrid
description: Returns whether the Supergalactic Grid is visible.

name: setColorSupergalacticGrid
description: Sets the color of the Supergalactic Grid lines.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorSupergalacticGrid
description: Returns the current color of the Supergalactic Grid.

name: setFlagEquatorLine
description: Shows or hides the Celestial Equator line (the projection of Earth's equator onto the celestial sphere for the current date).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show equator line, false to hide

name: getFlagEquatorLine
description: Returns whether the Celestial Equator line is visible.

name: setFlagEquatorParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks (ticks) along the Celestial Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show partition ticks, false to hide

name: getFlagEquatorParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Celestial Equator are visible.

name: setFlagEquatorLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels (coordinate values) along the Celestial Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagEquatorLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Celestial Equator are visible.

name: setColorEquatorLine
description: Sets the color of the Celestial Equator line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEquatorLine
description: Returns the current color of the Celestial Equator line.

name: setFlagEquatorJ2000Line
description: Shows or hides the Celestial Equator line for the J2000.0 epoch.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show J2000 equator line, false to hide

name: getFlagEquatorJ2000Line
description: Returns whether the J2000 Celestial Equator line is visible.

name: setFlagEquatorJ2000Parts
description: Shows or hides partition marks on the J2000 Celestial Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagEquatorJ2000Parts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the J2000 Celestial Equator are visible.

name: setFlagEquatorJ2000Labeled
description: Shows or hides labels on the J2000 Celestial Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagEquatorJ2000Labeled
description: Returns whether labels on the J2000 Celestial Equator are visible.

name: setColorEquatorJ2000Line
description: Sets the color of the J2000 Celestial Equator line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEquatorJ2000Line
description: Returns the current color of the J2000 Celestial Equator line.

name: setFlagFixedEquatorLine
description: Shows or hides the Fixed Equator line (Hour Angle/Declination reference).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show fixed equator line, false to hide

name: getFlagFixedEquatorLine
description: Returns whether the Fixed Equator line is visible.

name: setFlagFixedEquatorParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks on the Fixed Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagFixedEquatorParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Fixed Equator are visible.

name: setFlagFixedEquatorLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels on the Fixed Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagFixedEquatorLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Fixed Equator are visible.

name: setColorFixedEquatorLine
description: Sets the color of the Fixed Equator line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorFixedEquatorLine
description: Returns the current color of the Fixed Equator line.

name: setFlagEclipticLine
description: Shows or hides the Ecliptic line (the apparent path of the Sun across the celestial sphere for the current date).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show ecliptic line, false to hide

name: getFlagEclipticLine
description: Returns whether the Ecliptic line is visible.

name: setFlagEclipticParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks along the Ecliptic line (usually every 10 degrees).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show ecliptic partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagEclipticParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Ecliptic are visible.

name: setFlagEclipticLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels (longitude values) along the Ecliptic line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show ecliptic labels, false to hide

name: getFlagEclipticLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Ecliptic are visible.

name: setFlagEclipticDatesLabeled
description: Shows or hides date labels along the Ecliptic indicating the Sun's position throughout the current year.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show date labels on ecliptic, false to hide

name: getFlagEclipticDatesLabeled
description: Returns whether date labels on the Ecliptic are visible.

name: setColorEclipticLine
description: Sets the color of the Ecliptic line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEclipticLine
description: Returns the current color of the Ecliptic line.

name: setFlagEclipticJ2000Line
description: Shows or hides the Ecliptic line for the J2000.0 epoch.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show J2000 ecliptic line, false to hide

name: getFlagEclipticJ2000Line
description: Returns whether the J2000 Ecliptic line is visible.

name: setFlagEclipticJ2000Parts
description: Shows or hides partition marks on the J2000 Ecliptic line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagEclipticJ2000Parts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the J2000 Ecliptic are visible.

name: setFlagEclipticJ2000Labeled
description: Shows or hides labels on the J2000 Ecliptic line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagEclipticJ2000Labeled
description: Returns whether labels on the J2000 Ecliptic are visible.

name: setColorEclipticJ2000Line
description: Sets the color of the J2000 Ecliptic line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEclipticJ2000Line
description: Returns the current color of the J2000 Ecliptic line.

name: setFlagInvariablePlaneLine
description: Shows or hides the Invariable Plane of the Solar System (the plane perpendicular to the total angular momentum vector of the solar system).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show invariable plane line, false to hide

name: getFlagInvariablePlaneLine
description: Returns whether the Invariable Plane line is visible.

name: setColorInvariablePlaneLine
description: Sets the color of the Invariable Plane line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorInvariablePlaneLine
description: Returns the current color of the Invariable Plane line.

name: setFlagSolarEquatorLine
description: Shows or hides the projected Solar Equator line (the Sun's equatorial plane projected onto the celestial sphere).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show solar equator line, false to hide

name: getFlagSolarEquatorLine
description: Returns whether the Solar Equator line is visible.

name: setFlagSolarEquatorParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks on the Solar Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagSolarEquatorParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Solar Equator are visible.

name: setFlagSolarEquatorLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels on the Solar Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagSolarEquatorLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Solar Equator are visible.

name: setColorSolarEquatorLine
description: Sets the color of the Solar Equator line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorSolarEquatorLine
description: Returns the current color of the Solar Equator line.

name: setFlagPrecessionCircles
description: Shows or hides the precession circles (paths traced by the celestial poles over thousands of years due to Earth's axial precession).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show precession circles, false to hide

name: getFlagPrecessionCircles
description: Returns whether precession circles are visible.

name: setFlagPrecessionParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks (century ticks) on the precession circles.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show precession partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagPrecessionParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on precession circles are visible.

name: setFlagPrecessionLabeled
description: Shows or hides year labels on the precession circles (showing which century the pole position corresponds to).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show precession labels, false to hide

name: getFlagPrecessionLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on precession circles are visible.

name: setColorPrecessionCircles
description: Sets the color of the precession circles.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorPrecessionCircles
description: Returns the current color of the precession circles.

name: setFlagMeridianLine
description: Shows or hides the Meridian line (the great circle passing through the celestial poles and the observer's zenith).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show meridian line, false to hide

name: getFlagMeridianLine
description: Returns whether the Meridian line is visible.

name: setFlagMeridianParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks (altitude ticks) along the Meridian line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show meridian partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagMeridianParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Meridian are visible.

name: setFlagMeridianLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels (altitude values) along the Meridian line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show meridian labels, false to hide

name: getFlagMeridianLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Meridian are visible.

name: setColorMeridianLine
description: Sets the color of the Meridian line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorMeridianLine
description: Returns the current color of the Meridian line.

name: setFlagHorizonLine
description: Shows or hides the Horizon line (the circle where the sky meets the ground).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show horizon line, false to hide

name: getFlagHorizonLine
description: Returns whether the Horizon line is visible.

name: setFlagHorizonParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks (azimuth ticks) on the Horizon line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show horizon partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagHorizonParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Horizon are visible.

name: setFlagHorizonLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels (azimuth/direction labels) on the Horizon line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show horizon labels, false to hide

name: getFlagHorizonLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Horizon are visible.

name: setColorHorizonLine
description: Sets the color of the Horizon line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorHorizonLine
description: Returns the current color of the Horizon line.

name: setFlagGalacticEquatorLine
description: Shows or hides the Galactic Equator line (the plane of the Milky Way galaxy).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show galactic equator line, false to hide

name: getFlagGalacticEquatorLine
description: Returns whether the Galactic Equator line is visible.

name: setFlagGalacticEquatorParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks on the Galactic Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagGalacticEquatorParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Galactic Equator are visible.

name: setFlagGalacticEquatorLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels on the Galactic Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagGalacticEquatorLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Galactic Equator are visible.

name: setColorGalacticEquatorLine
description: Sets the color of the Galactic Equator line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorGalacticEquatorLine
description: Returns the current color of the Galactic Equator line.

name: setFlagSupergalacticEquatorLine
description: Shows or hides the Supergalactic Equator line (the equatorial plane of the local supercluster of galaxies).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show supergalactic equator line, false to hide

name: getFlagSupergalacticEquatorLine
description: Returns whether the Supergalactic Equator line is visible.

name: setFlagSupergalacticEquatorParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks on the Supergalactic Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagSupergalacticEquatorParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Supergalactic Equator are visible.

name: setFlagSupergalacticEquatorLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels on the Supergalactic Equator line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagSupergalacticEquatorLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Supergalactic Equator are visible.

name: setColorSupergalacticEquatorLine
description: Sets the color of the Supergalactic Equator line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorSupergalacticEquatorLine
description: Returns the current color of the Supergalactic Equator line.

name: setFlagPrimeVerticalLine
description: Shows or hides the Prime Vertical line (the great circle passing through the zenith, east point, nadir, and west point).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show prime vertical line, false to hide

name: getFlagPrimeVerticalLine
description: Returns whether the Prime Vertical line is visible.

name: setFlagPrimeVerticalParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks on the Prime Vertical line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagPrimeVerticalParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Prime Vertical are visible.

name: setFlagPrimeVerticalLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels on the Prime Vertical line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagPrimeVerticalLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Prime Vertical are visible.

name: setColorPrimeVerticalLine
description: Sets the color of the Prime Vertical line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorPrimeVerticalLine
description: Returns the current color of the Prime Vertical line.

name: setFlagCurrentVerticalLine
description: Shows or hides the Current Vertical line (the great circle passing through the zenith and the current view center direction).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show current vertical line, false to hide

name: getFlagCurrentVerticalLine
description: Returns whether the Current Vertical line is visible.

name: setFlagCurrentVerticalParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks on the Current Vertical line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagCurrentVerticalParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Current Vertical are visible.

name: setFlagCurrentVerticalLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels on the Current Vertical line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagCurrentVerticalLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Current Vertical are visible.

name: setColorCurrentVerticalLine
description: Sets the color of the Current Vertical line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorCurrentVerticalLine
description: Returns the current color of the Current Vertical line.

name: setFlagColureLines
description: Shows or hides the Colure lines (the great circles passing through the celestial poles and the equinoxes/solstices).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show colure lines, false to hide

name: getFlagColureLines
description: Returns whether the Colure lines are visible.

name: setFlagColureParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks on the Colure lines.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagColureParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Colures are visible.

name: setFlagColureLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels on the Colure lines.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagColureLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Colures are visible.

name: setColorColureLines
description: Sets the color of the Colure lines.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorColureLines
description: Returns the current color of the Colure lines.

name: setFlagLongitudeLine
description: Shows or hides the Opposition/Conjunction longitude line (great circle through the Sun and Earth's position, used to mark planetary alignments).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show opposition/conjunction line, false to hide

name: getFlagLongitudeLine
description: Returns whether the Opposition/Conjunction longitude line is visible.

name: setFlagLongitudeParts
description: Shows or hides partition marks on the Opposition/Conjunction longitude line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show partitions, false to hide

name: getFlagLongitudeParts
description: Returns whether partition marks on the Opposition/Conjunction line are visible.

name: setFlagLongitudeLabeled
description: Shows or hides labels on the Opposition/Conjunction longitude line.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagLongitudeLabeled
description: Returns whether labels on the Opposition/Conjunction line are visible.

name: setColorLongitudeLine
description: Sets the color of the Opposition/Conjunction longitude line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorLongitudeLine
description: Returns the current color of the Opposition/Conjunction longitude line.

name: setFlagQuadratureLine
description: Shows or hides the Quadrature line (great circle perpendicular to the Sun-Earth line, marking positions 90 degrees from opposition/conjunction).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show quadrature line, false to hide

name: getFlagQuadratureLine
description: Returns whether the Quadrature line is visible.

name: setColorQuadratureLine
description: Sets the color of the Quadrature line.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorQuadratureLine
description: Returns the current color of the Quadrature line.

name: setFlagCircumpolarCircles
description: Shows or hides the Circumpolar Circles (the circles around the celestial poles within which stars never set or never rise).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show circumpolar circles, false to hide

name: getFlagCircumpolarCircles
description: Returns whether the Circumpolar Circles are visible.

name: setColorCircumpolarCircles
description: Sets the color of the Circumpolar Circles.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorCircumpolarCircles
description: Returns the current color of the Circumpolar Circles.

name: setFlagUmbraCircle
description: Shows or hides the Umbra circle (the dark inner shadow of Earth cast at the Moon's distance). Useful for predicting lunar eclipses.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show umbra circle, false to hide

name: getFlagUmbraCircle
description: Returns whether the Umbra circle is visible.

name: setColorUmbraCircle
description: Sets the color of the Umbra circle.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorUmbraCircle
description: Returns the current color of the Umbra circle.

name: setFlagPenumbraCircle
description: Shows or hides the Penumbra circle (the partial shadow of Earth cast at the Moon's distance).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show penumbra circle, false to hide

name: getFlagPenumbraCircle
description: Returns whether the Penumbra circle is visible.

name: setColorPenumbraCircle
description: Sets the color of the Penumbra circle.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorPenumbraCircle
description: Returns the current color of the Penumbra circle.

name: setFlagCelestialJ2000Poles
description: Shows or hides the Celestial Poles (North and South) for the J2000.0 epoch.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show J2000 celestial poles, false to hide

name: getFlagCelestialJ2000Poles
description: Returns whether the J2000 Celestial Poles are visible.

name: setColorCelestialJ2000Poles
description: Sets the color of the J2000 Celestial Pole markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorCelestialJ2000Poles
description: Returns the current color of the J2000 Celestial Pole markers.

name: setFlagCelestialPoles
description: Shows or hides the Celestial Poles (North and South) for the current date (taking precession into account).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show celestial poles, false to hide

name: getFlagCelestialPoles
description: Returns whether the current Celestial Poles are visible.

name: setColorCelestialPoles
description: Sets the color of the Celestial Pole markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorCelestialPoles
description: Returns the current color of the Celestial Pole markers.

name: setFlagZenithNadir
description: Shows or hides the Zenith (point directly overhead) and Nadir (point directly below feet) markers.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show zenith and nadir, false to hide

name: getFlagZenithNadir
description: Returns whether the Zenith and Nadir markers are visible.

name: setColorZenithNadir
description: Sets the color of the Zenith and Nadir markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorZenithNadir
description: Returns the current color of the Zenith and Nadir markers.

name: setFlagEclipticJ2000Poles
description: Shows or hides the Ecliptic Poles (North and South) for the J2000.0 epoch.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show J2000 ecliptic poles, false to hide

name: getFlagEclipticJ2000Poles
description: Returns whether the J2000 Ecliptic Poles are visible.

name: setColorEclipticJ2000Poles
description: Sets the color of the J2000 Ecliptic Pole markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEclipticJ2000Poles
description: Returns the current color of the J2000 Ecliptic Pole markers.

name: setFlagEclipticPoles
description: Shows or hides the Ecliptic Poles (North and South) at the current date (taking precession into account).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show ecliptic poles, false to hide

name: getFlagEclipticPoles
description: Returns whether the current Ecliptic Poles are visible.

name: setColorEclipticPoles
description: Sets the color of the Ecliptic Pole markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEclipticPoles
description: Returns the current color of the Ecliptic Pole markers.

name: setFlagGalacticPoles
description: Shows or hides the Galactic Poles (North and South) of the Milky Way galaxy.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show galactic poles, false to hide

name: getFlagGalacticPoles
description: Returns whether the Galactic Poles are visible.

name: setColorGalacticPoles
description: Sets the color of the Galactic Pole markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorGalacticPoles
description: Returns the current color of the Galactic Pole markers.

name: setFlagGalacticCenter
description: Shows or hides the Galactic Center and Galactic Anticenter markers.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show galactic center markers, false to hide

name: getFlagGalacticCenter
description: Returns whether the Galactic Center markers are visible.

name: setColorGalacticCenter
description: Sets the color of the Galactic Center and Anticenter markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorGalacticCenter
description: Returns the current color of the Galactic Center markers.

name: setFlagSupergalacticPoles
description: Shows or hides the Supergalactic Poles (North and South) of the local supercluster of galaxies.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show supergalactic poles, false to hide

name: getFlagSupergalacticPoles
description: Returns whether the Supergalactic Poles are visible.

name: setColorSupergalacticPoles
description: Sets the color of the Supergalactic Pole markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorSupergalacticPoles
description: Returns the current color of the Supergalactic Pole markers.

name: setFlagEquinoxJ2000Points
description: Shows or hides the Equinox points (Vernal and Autumnal) for the J2000.0 epoch.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show J2000 equinox points, false to hide

name: getFlagEquinoxJ2000Points
description: Returns whether the J2000 Equinox points are visible.

name: setColorEquinoxJ2000Points
description: Sets the color of the J2000 Equinox point markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEquinoxJ2000Points
description: Returns the current color of the J2000 Equinox point markers.

name: setFlagEquinoxPoints
description: Shows or hides the Equinox points (Vernal and Autumnal) for the current date.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show equinox points, false to hide

example:
// Mark the current equinox positions
GridLinesMgr.setFlagEquinoxPoints(true);

name: getFlagEquinoxPoints
description: Returns whether the current Equinox points are visible.

name: setColorEquinoxPoints
description: Sets the color of the Equinox point markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorEquinoxPoints
description: Returns the current color of the Equinox point markers.

name: setFlagSolsticeJ2000Points
description: Shows or hides the Solstice points (Summer and Winter) for the J2000.0 epoch.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show J2000 solstice points, false to hide

name: getFlagSolsticeJ2000Points
description: Returns whether the J2000 Solstice points are visible.

name: setColorSolsticeJ2000Points
description: Sets the color of the J2000 Solstice point markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorSolsticeJ2000Points
description: Returns the current color of the J2000 Solstice point markers.

name: setFlagSolsticePoints
description: Shows or hides the Solstice points (Summer and Winter) for the current date.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show solstice points, false to hide

example:
// Mark the current solstice positions
GridLinesMgr.setFlagSolsticePoints(true);

name: getFlagSolsticePoints
description: Returns whether the current Solstice points are visible.

name: setColorSolsticePoints
description: Sets the color of the Solstice point markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorSolsticePoints
description: Returns the current color of the Solstice point markers.

name: setFlagAntisolarPoint
description: Shows or hides the Antisolar Point (the point directly opposite the Sun in the sky).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show antisolar point, false to hide

name: getFlagAntisolarPoint
description: Returns whether the Antisolar Point is visible.

name: setColorAntisolarPoint
description: Sets the color of the Antisolar Point marker.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorAntisolarPoint
description: Returns the current color of the Antisolar Point marker.

name: setFlagUmbraCenterPoint
description: Shows or hides the Center of Earth's Umbra point (the center of Earth's dark shadow projected at the Moon's distance).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show umbra center point, false to hide

name: getFlagUmbraCenterPoint
description: Returns whether the Center of Earth's Umbra point is visible.

name: setFlagApexPoints
description: Shows or hides the Apex and Antapex points (the direction of the observer planet's motion and the opposite direction).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show apex points, false to hide

name: getFlagApexPoints
description: Returns whether the Apex and Antapex points are visible.

name: setColorApexPoints
description: Sets the color of the Apex and Antapex point markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector

name: getColorApexPoints
description: Returns the current color of the Apex and Antapex point markers.

name: setLineThickness
description: Sets the thickness of all grid lines and great circles in pixels.

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.description: Line thickness in pixels (recommended: 1-5, default: 1)

name: getLineThickness
description: Returns the current thickness of grid lines and great circles in pixels.
example:
var thickness = GridLinesMgr.getLineThickness();
core.debug("Line thickness: " + thickness);

name: setPartThickness
description: Sets the thickness of partition (tick) lines on great circles.

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.description: Partition thickness in pixels (recommended: 1-3)

name: getPartThickness
description: Returns the current thickness of partition (tick) lines.

name: setPointSize
description: Sets the size of reference point markers (poles, zenith, etc.) in pixels.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Point size in pixels (recommended: 5-15, default: 5)

name: getPointSize
description: Returns the current size of reference point markers in pixels.
example:
var size = GridLinesMgr.getPointSize();
core.debug("Point marker size: " + size);

name: setGridSpacingMultiplier
description: Sets the grid spacing multiplier. Values less than 1 make grids sparser, values greater than 1 make grids denser.

parameters.name: multiplier
parameters.description: Spacing multiplier (0.5 = coarse grid, 1.0 = normal, 2.0 = fine grid)

name: getGridSpacingMultiplier
description: Returns the current grid spacing multiplier.
example:
var multiplier = GridLinesMgr.getGridSpacingMultiplier();
core.debug("Grid spacing: " + multiplier);
